risks.title: Duplicate events polluting event stream
risks.evidence: 4 events for same file (Security.tsx) with identical/near-identical timestamps (within 1ms). Events tagged as duplicates suggest systemic issue.
risks.recommendedAction: Investigate code-observer event generation to eliminate duplicate event creation. Implement deduplication logic or fix underlying source.

risks.title: Security module modified without documented review
risks.evidence: Security.tsx changes detected (high relevance events 2f805734, 1d184a43) but no evidence of security testing or code review completion.
risks.recommendedAction: Review recent Security.tsx modifications and run security tests before merging.

opportunities.title: Implement event deduplication system
opportunities.evidence: Duplicate events at millisecond intervals indicate systematic duplication. Fixing this will reduce noise and improve system reliability.
opportunities.suggestedAction: Add deduplication logic to code-observer: deduplicate events for same file within 10ms window.

opportunities.title: Add automated security testing trigger
opportunities.evidence: Security file changes detected but no automated tests triggered. Pattern suggests opportunity for safety automation.
opportunities.suggestedAction: Create CI workflow that auto-triggers security tests when Security.tsx is modified.

taskCandidates.title: Review and test Security.tsx changes
taskCandidates.description: Examine recent modifications to Security.tsx (changed at 2026-04-27T19:02:39Z and 19:02:22Z). Run security tests to validate changes.
taskCandidates.rationale: Security module changes require validation before deployment to prevent vulnerabilities.

taskCandidates.title: Fix event duplication in code-observer
taskCandidates.description: Investigate why Security.tsx modifications are generating duplicate events at millisecond intervals. Add deduplication or fix source.
taskCandidates.rationale: Duplicate events cause noise, consume resources, and obscure true changes. Fixing improves system signal-to-noise ratio.

recommendations.title: Implement event deduplication
recommendations.rationale: 4 duplicate events indicate systemic issue affecting event reliability and observer accuracy.
recommendations.action: Add deduplication logic: collapse events for same file within 10ms window into single event with merged metadata.

recommendations.title: Prioritize security review
recommendations.rationale: Security.tsx is critical component; changes require validation.
recommendations.action: Review the high-relevance security events (2f805734, 1d184a43) immediately and run security test suite.

pendingApprovals.reason: Sensitive proactive task requires approval: Review and test Security.tsx changes
